newsSince: No new profit warning or fundamental disclosure since June 9; the -21.8% move is a speculative unwind in a hyper-volatile EUR0.16B micro-cap (52-wk range 0.47-16.00, +613% YTD). The standing overhang is structural: thin cash (~EUR2.9M end-2025), a stated funding horizon only 'beyond June 30, 2026,' and OpenChip warrants/capital-increase mechanism that dilutes toward 51% ownership.

sources.label: Kalray FY2025 revenue/EBITDA & funding update (Actusnews, Jan 2026)

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling lens via DPU optionality. No fresh fundamental catalyst; the sharp drop is speculative unwind, but the persistent dilution overhang (OpenChip path to 51%) plus tight cash runway weakens the fundamental setup vs scaling peers. Modest negative.
verdicts.bull: Patented DPU/data-processing IP offers genuine inference-offload optionality if OpenChip backing scales it commercially.
verdicts.neutral: Real DPU tech but tiny, pre-scale revenue inside a cash-light micro-cap whose tape is detached from fundamentals.
verdicts.bear: Severe dilution mechanism toward 51%, ~EUR2.9M cash and a runway only just past June 30 2026; equity value is highly impaired.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: A funded OpenChip-backed DPU design win or capital injection that extends runway without punitive dilution.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Dilutive capital raise / warrant exercise and cash exhaustion crushing per-share value.
